_comment: CANONICAL money constants for the $100 entertainment bankroll — the single source of truth for the core entertainment lane (lib/entertainment.js) and the exploration lane (config/exploration-rules.json, which is test-locked to these values by test/test-money-constants.js). These are entertainment overrides chosen by the human: NOT validated Kelly sizing, NOT fitted to any result, NOT evidence of edge. Frozen — do not tune.
